case_title: PREFERRED REALTY ADVISORS, INC. VS. DANIELLE TUTTLE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PREFERRED REALTY ADVISORS, INC.
